en: The fact that Razzles has never reached out to me,
offered me anything, paid me, is like...
I am THE spokesperson for Razzles.
Candy and a gum. I don't know if you know that.
You have to do a few and it takes a minute.
I mean, you've put me in a spot.
Am I not gonna choose Razzles?
Exactly. It would be rude. It would be, like, disloyal.
